description_long: This is a German police van with a boxy, utilitarian design, painted in a two-tone green and white color scheme. The word 'POLIZEI' is prominently displayed in white block letters on the sides and front, indicating its law enforcement purpose. The vehicle features a blue emergency light on the roof, as well as smaller lights and siren equipment. The van has four doors, including sliding side doors and rear double doors, with visible handles and windows. The wheels are robust, and the body is constructed from metal panels with black trim and bumpers. The rear of the van displays additional markings and taillights, and the overall build suggests a sturdy, functional emergency vehicle.
description: A green and white German police van with 'POLIZEI' markings, blue roof lights, and robust metal construction.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing 'POLIZEI' text, blue roof light, and the van's grille and headlights.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side sliding door, roof light, and the extended length of the van.
description_view_2: Rear and side view displaying taillights, rear doors, and the green and white color split.
description_view_3: Rear perspective emphasizing the back doors, taillights, and the 'POLIZEI' text on the side.
attribute_police_markings: The word 'POLIZEI' is displayed in large, white, uppercase letters on both sides and the front of the van. The font is bold and sans-serif, clearly identifying the vehicle as a police unit. No additional numbers, stripes, or checkered patterns are visible.
attribute_emergency_lights: A single blue cylindrical emergency light is mounted on the roof near the front of the van. No additional light bars or grille lights are visible.
attribute_license_plate: A rectangular license plate is visible on the front and rear of the van, white in color with black text. The exact text is not legible, and there are no special markings or codes visible.
